subject: [COMMON] Fix for ServiceAccount in network-name-gen
commit_message:
[COMMON] Fix for ServiceAccount in network-name-gen

Added missing SA definition in values.yaml and changed
location in deployment.yaml

Issue-ID: OOM-3199

Change-Id: I1d488e8d0d65c4cd3cf0ae21d22fa1143c8d64ab
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6920/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6920/ )
